title: Karpatiosorbus acutiserrata
taxonomy: Karpatiosorbus acutiserrata is classified within the family Rosaceae. This family includes a wide range of flowering plants, commonly known as the rose family. It is part of the genus Karpatiosorbus, a group of shrubs or small trees native to certain regions. The specific classification of Karpatiosorbus acutiserrata also includes its taxonomic rank within the kingdom Plantae. Further classification may involve details such as species, genus, family, and kingdom levels.

intro: Karpatiosorbus acutiserrata, also known as the Karpatian rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, offering various health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and wound healing. The bioactive constituents of Karpatiosorbus acutiserrata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
